meaning: adj.不到时候的,不适时的,不合时宜的adv.过早地,不合时宜地
examples: The untimely death of the engineer delayed the completion of the project.
His mother's untimely death had a catastrophic effect on him.
Principal Carlo Cuomo said students, staff and governors were "devastated" at Mr Taylor's "untimely death".
Though untimely, the temperatures in Montana haven't caused any heat-related deaths, state officials said.
